sub_modules.aes128_key_expand: Combinational AES-128 key expansion producing all eleven 128-bit round keys.
sub_modules.aes128_decrypt_core: Combinational AES-128 decryption datapath using reverse round-key order.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_round: Combinational inverse AES round wrapper for InvShiftRows, InvSubBytes, AddRoundKey, and optional InvMixColumns.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_subbytes: Combinational AES inverse S-box substitution over a 128-bit state.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_mixcolumns: Combinational AES inverse MixColumns transform over four state columns.
